summary: Completed testing Sub-fase 1.9 Faktur Pajak Jual feature. Backend APIs working correctly (10/10 tests passed). Frontend wiring completed successfully with all navigation and UI components in place. However, frontend data loading issue prevents display of seeded data (tax invoices, products, warehouses, orders all showing 0/empty despite backend returning correct data).

integration_issues.issue: Frontend not displaying data from backend APIs - all metrics show 0, tax invoices list empty, orders list empty despite backend returning correct data (7 products, 3 warehouses, 1 tax invoice FKT-00001, 8 orders)
integration_issues.impact: CRITICAL - Users cannot see any data in the application
integration_issues.root_cause: Likely entity filtering issue or data loading (loadAll) not working correctly. Backend APIs return data successfully but frontend state is not updated
affected_endpoints: GET /api/tax-invoices (returns FKT-00001 but frontend shows empty)

passed_tests: Backend: Login with admin@kainnusantara.id succeeds (200 OK)
Backend: Login with sales@kainnusantara.id succeeds (200 OK)
Backend: Login with manager@kainnusantara.id succeeds (200 OK)
Backend: Login with warehouse@kainnusantara.id succeeds (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/tax-invoices returns list with FKT-00001
Backend: FKT-00001 has all required fields (DPP=9500000, PPN=1045000, Total=10545000)
Backend: GET /api/products returns 7 products
Backend: GET /api/warehouses returns 3 warehouses
Backend: GET /api/tax-invoices/{fkt_id}/document returns HTML

Frontend: Login with admin@kainnusantara.id succeeds
Frontend: Dashboard loads successfully

Frontend: Filter tabs (Semua/Normal/Pengganti/Batal) visible and clickable
Frontend: Table headers (NO. FAKTUR, NSFP, ORDER, PEMBELI, DPP, PPN, TOTAL, STATUS, AKSI) present
Frontend: Sales role login successful
Frontend: 'Faktur Pajak' menu visible for sales role
Frontend: Manager role login successful
Frontend: 'Faktur Pajak' menu visible for manager role
Frontend: All navigation config entries correct (PAGE_META, buildNavigation, role allowlists)
Frontend: TaxInvoices component imported and rendered in App.js
Frontend: issueTaxInvoice action passed to OrdersView
Frontend: OrderDetailPanel has tax invoice section with 'Terbitkan Faktur Pajak' button
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix frontend data loading issue. Backend APIs return correct data (7 products, 3 warehouses, 1 tax invoice FKT-00001, 8 orders) but frontend displays 0/empty for all. Investigate: (1) Entity filtering logic - check if 'Semua Entitas' filter is working correctly, (2) loadAll() function in useAppActions hook - verify it's fetching and setting state correctly, (3) Check if data is being filtered out by selectedEntity state. All Sub-fase 1.9 frontend wiring is complete and correct, but users cannot see data until this loading issue is resolved.

success_percentage.integration: 0% (data not loading from backend to frontend)
